name: Global Lock Leak in Tests

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Global Lock Leak in Tests is complete and correct

scope: start_test.go TestStartCmd_ValidationErrors calls start without setting GlobalLockDir, causing it to acquire the real ~/.wolfcastle/daemon.lock. Every test that invokes the start command must redirect GlobalLockDir to t.TempDir() to avoid acquiring real locks and leaking state between test runs.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 leaf child: fix-leaking-tests (4 tasks). Covers 5 leaking tests across 3 files: start_test.go (3 tests), start_coverage_test.go (1 test), start_deep_coverage_test.go (1 test). All need the same GlobalLockDir = t.TempDir() pattern already established in start_validation_test.go. No specs or ADRs needed; this is a mechanical fix applying an existing pattern.

escalations.description: TestStartCmd_AlreadyRunning in cmd/daemon/daemon_test.go:672 reaches dmn.AcquireGlobalLock without redirecting GlobalLockDir, leaking the real daemon.lock during tests. Same pattern as the tests fixed in this node.
